GameToken.Name: Expertise.MeleeUnarmed
GameToken.Description: Combat ability; used w/ no large weapon

GameToken.Name: Expertise.MeleeBlunt
GameToken.Description: Combat ability; used with bashing weapons

GameToken.Name: Expertise.MeleeBlade
GameToken.Description: Combat ability; used with axes and bladed weapons

GameToken.Name: Expertise.GunPistol
GameToken.Description: Gun ability: used with handguns and revolvers

GameToken.Name: Expertise.GunAssault
GameToken.Description: Gun ability; used with assault rifles and SMGs

GameToken.Name: Expertise.GunHeavy
GameToken.Description: Gun ability; used with machine guns

GameToken.Name: Expertise.Medicine
GameToken.Description: Medical ability; used with Medical Bag item

GameToken.Name: Expertise.Repair
GameToken.Description: Repair ability; used with Tool Kit item

GameToken.Name: Renown
GameToken.Description: Wealth rating; determines available influence each day
